creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:

From-To: open->feedback

Also, these four lines needs to be limited to MYSQL option: 
%%GRASS_INST_DIR%%/docs/html/mesql.html 
%%GRASS_INST_DIR%%/docs/html/mysql.html 
%%GRASS_INST_DIR%%/man/man1/mesql.1 
%%GRASS_INST_DIR%%/man/man1/mysql.1 

And finaly, this file must not be in pkg-plist: 
libdata/ldconfig/grass 

Please fix.
